tiktok.caption: You opted into overdraft protection. Your bank is charging you 17,000% interest on it.

youtube_short.title: Overdraft 'Protection' Is a 17,000% APR Loan
title_alternatives: Your Bank's 'Protection' Fee Is Actually a 17,000% Loan
The Hidden Loan Your Bank Designed to Keep You Paying
youtube_short.description: You signed up for overdraft protection to avoid embarrassment at the register — but your bank forgot to mention it's one of the most expensive loans ever designed. The average overdraft is $24. Your bank charges $35 to cover it, which works out to a 17,000% annual interest rate. Banks collected $15 billion in overdraft fees last year, and 80% came from just 9% of customers. Most banks will quietly refund one fee per year if you call and ask — and linking a savings account removes the fee entirely. Follow for more money traps hiding in plain sight. #overdraftfees #bankfees #moneytips #personalfinance

hook_line: Your bank charges 17,000% interest — and called it 'protection'
